evals.prompt: A complete symbol and dynamic-load analysis found no use of one direct Maven dependency. Produce the Batch 6 decision and gates.
evals.expected: Select REMOVE with analyzer evidence; do not add a target package; require native build resolution and contract evidence before D-D.

evals.prompt: A target npm package has a very similar name and high popularity, but no API mapping or license evidence. Decide whether it may pass D-C.
evals.expected: Do not select automatically; emit an evidence blocker and keep D-C blocked regardless of heuristic score.

evals.prompt: A Python ML dependency has no semantically faithful Java replacement, but a pinned Python service can be retained. Define the minimum gate evidence.
evals.expected: Use an explicit retained-runtime or sidecar strategy with versioned schema, lifecycle, security, deployment, support, serialization and differential tests.
